message:
✨ Add root cause analysis to offline detection card (#551)

* 🐛 Fix blank cards by adding quick timeout for static/demo cards

Cards that don't use useCardLoadingState (static content, demo data, games)
were showing blank until the 5-second skeleton timeout. This adds a 150ms
initialRenderTimedOut timer that assumes content is ready for non-reporting
cards, fixing the blank card issue without modifying 140+ individual cards.

Changes:
- Add 150ms initialRenderTimedOut for quick detection of static cards
- Include isDemoMode in skeleton prevention (not just isDemoData prop)
- Add 300ms collapseDelayPassed to ensure content is visible before collapse
- Update effectiveIsLoading and effectiveHasData to use quick timeout

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* ✨ Add namespace info to offline detector predictions

- Add namespace field to AIPrediction type
- Include namespace from pod data in heuristic predictions
- Display namespace badge on prediction items
- Change offline detection card default size to large (8)
- Make all prediction styling consistent blue color

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* ✨ Add namespace field to AI predictions

- Add Namespace field to AIPrediction struct
- Update AI prompt to request namespace in predictions
- Parse namespace from AI response

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* ✨ Include namespace in pod issue data for AI predictions

- Add Namespace field to PodIssueSummary struct
- Populate namespace when gathering pod issues for AI analysis

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Fix namespace tooltip to use colon format

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* ✨ Add Hardware Health card with device disappearance detection

- Track GPU, NIC, NVMe, InfiniBand disappearances on SuperMicro/HGX nodes
- Backend device tracker with 60-second scan interval
- Alert when device counts drop (GPUs critical, others warning)
- Inventory view showing all devices per node/cluster
- Native macOS notifications for device alerts
- Toggle between Alerts and Inventory views
- Added to AI-ML, GPU, Clusters, and Main dashboards

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* ✨ Add root cause analysis to offline detection card

- Parse node conditions (MemoryPressure, DiskPressure, PIDPressure, etc.)
- Show specific root cause for unhealthy nodes (e.g., "Memory pressure", "Disk pressure")
- Include detailed explanation in tooltips
- Add root cause info to AI mission context for better troubleshooting
- Handle cordoned nodes as "Cordoned for maintenance"

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
